subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones, men and women! Give thanks unto God that ye are among the faithful, both men and women, and among those endowed with certitude, both men and women [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتین ای ثابتات شکر کنید خدا را که مومنید و مومنات و موقنید و موقنات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
